title: Install Viralatas
subtitle: Works offline at Wacken. No app store needed.
iosStep1: Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari (square with ↑).
iosStep2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen".
iosStep3: Open Viralatas from your home screen — push alerts and offline mode work best there.
androidStep1: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top-right corner of Chrome.
androidStep2: Tap "Install app" or "Add to Home screen".
androidStep3: Open from your home screen for the full festival experience.
androidOrManual: Or use the menu: ⋮ → Install app
profileLinkHint: Add to home screen for offline use and push alerts
